subcodes.title: Words to some Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-19
subcodes.first_line: We love meetings of fidelity and not picturesque scenes. We must first be faithful to God, to His ordinances and Covenant and to His servants
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما محافل وفا را دوست داریم نه مناظر با صفا و اما وفا اول باید بخدا و اوامر و عهد او نمود
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
